stmt: ∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, x * y = x * z → y = z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x : α, x * x = x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ meet : α → α → α, ∀ x y : α, x * (meet x y) = x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * (x * z) = (x * y) * z
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, x * (y * z) = (x * y) * (x * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y z : α, (x * y) * z = x * (y * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * x = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ x y : α, (x * y) * y = x * y
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α] {e : α}, (∀ x : α, e * x = x) → ∀ x : α, x * e = x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α] {e : α}, (∀ x : α, e * x = x) → ∀ x y : α, x * y = y * x
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], (∃ e : α, ∀ x : α, ∃ y : α, x * y = e ∧ y * x = e) → Subsingleton α
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], Subsingleton α → ∃ e : α, ∀ x : α, ∃ y : α, x * y = e ∧ y * x = e
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ join : α → α → α, (∀ a b : α, join a b = a * b) → ∀ x y z : α, x * (join y z) = join (x * y) (x * z)
∀ {α : Type u} [SemigroupLike01 α], ∀ join : α → α → α, ∀ x y z : α, x * (join y z) = join (x * y) (x * z)
